title: M1 Curriculum Easing (Config Change)
body: Added stage-aligned eval suite m1_nominal_stage1 (vx=0.25/0.35/0.45) in configs/eval_suites_goal_pose.yaml

Updated configs/train_ppo_m1.yaml: eval suite switched to m1_nominal_stage1; v_x_target=0.35 (was 0.5); lower reset noise (qpos 0.005, qvel 0.02); modest stability reward tweaks (w_upright, w_alive, torque penalty)
